_comment: Committed performance-baseline targets. Compared by scripts/perf-baseline-check.sh against the report
produced by ./gradlew :cloud-test-harness:perfBaselines. Drift over driftThresholdPercent surfaces a
warning in the nightly CI summary; never fails the build.
Refresh policy: re-run the harness on a representative GitHub Actions runner, copy the observed values
below, and bump generatedAt. Document the refresh in docs/perf-baselines.md.
Initial seed values are conservative ceilings — they will not flag drift on first nightly runs and
should be tightened once 7+ nights of data are collected.
